description: You are a public health epidemiologist analyzing HIV surveillance data to characterize transmission routes and demographic risk factors using the HIV dataset (C:\EpiInfo7\Projects\HIV\HIV.mdb, table: Case). Conduct a comprehensive descriptive and stratified epidemiological analysis of HIV transmission patterns, exploring variables related to transmission category, age group, sex, race/ethnicity, and CD4 count or AIDS indicators. Perform frequency and means analyses on relevant variables, cross-tabulate transmission categories against outcome indicators, and run stratified analyses for specific demographic subgroups. Export the complete analysis results to C:\Users\Docker\hiv_transmission_analysis.html and a cross-tabulation summary to C:\Users\Docker\hiv_transmission_summary.csv.
